adversarial_check.description: Three-part mandatory dogfood check beyond the 17 listed commands, all scratchpad-located per instruction (avoiding the sandbox denial Mode B hit). (a) Reintroduced the exact phase-001 historical defect into a scratch copy: changed standard/NDS.md's authoritative_source from 'standard/NDS.md' to 'nizam-framework/standard/NDS.md' (the precise pattern that shipped through 22 internal gate reviews per ADR-001's Context). C2 correctly failed, naming the file and the mismatch, proving the validator catches what the pipeline's own history once missed. (b) Ran 'validate.sh --help' and confirmed it documents the shipped-doc set (CONTEXT.md, docs/architecture/*.md, standard/methodology/registry/templates/*.md, tools/*.md excluding fixtures/, schema/README.md) and C8's git-HEAD-diff semantics (new files skipped, meaningful only against a PR diff) verbatim as contracted. (c) Enumerated build_shipped_md_set()'s actual 'find ... -name *.md' commands directly and confirmed tools/validate.sh (.sh) and tools/skill.json (.json) are structurally absent from the C1/C2/C3/C5/C8 file set (not merely accidentally passing) -- the glob cannot match non-.md files -- and re-ran the full sweep, which completed cleanly with no error referencing either file as a frontmatter-parse target.
